---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for HiAi Observe
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve.

**Example scenario:**
> As a [type of user], I want [action] so that [benefit].

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
